name: daily monitor --once flag runs exactly one iteration then exits zero so it is testable in CI
command: mkdir -p pr-corpus && printf '{"gate":"pass"}\n' > pr-corpus/quality-eval.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/monitor.sh" --gate-result pr-corpus/quality-eval.json --once --sources-stub fixtures/sources.yaml 2>out.txt && grep -q 'iterations=1' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
